note: A mutable companion table provisioned alongside the append-only result tables, populated with a per-paper citation-in-degree feature derived from the committed declared citation graph, and federated into a JOIN over the papers source. The feature is graph-derived and deterministic. The table is APPEND-ONLY on this surface: INSERT and SELECT round-trip, but UPDATE / DELETE / duplicate-key INSERT are not wired through (they raise or hit the primary-key UNIQUE constraint). In-place upsert is a forthcoming engine capability not yet exposed on this surface — the teaching is register -> populate (append) -> federate, never edit-in-place. The measured verdict is the subject-level SUM(in_degree) JOIN aggregate (top subject + grand total), which the chapter reproduces live against this golden.
